_meta._placeholders: Variables in {curly_braces} should not be translated. Examples: {name}, {count}, {current}, {total}
_meta._plurals: Use pipe | to separate singular and plural forms. Example: '{count} item | {count} items'

auth.syncDataBanner: Sign in to sync your data across all your devices

translation.helpTranslateBanner: Help us translate endmin.moe to your language.

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {name} from your planner? This action cannot be undone.

descriptions.interactiveMap: Explore maps with collectibles and points of interest

footer.description: Your comprehensive companion for Arknights: Endfield. Our goal is to provide you with the best tools and resources to enhance your Arknights: Endfield gaming experience.
footer.disclaimer: endmin.moe is an unofficial fan-made website for Arknights: Endfield. All game assets and trademarks belong to their respective owners.

hero.description: Track your pulls, view global statistics, plan operator ascensions, explore guides, and browse the complete Arknights: Endfield database.

tracker.filterBannersDesc: Show or hide banners from the sidebar

stats.pullRatioTooltip: What percentage of your total pulls were {rarity}-stars?
stats.rateUpTooltip: What percentage of your pulls were rate up?

tracker.selectProfilePrompt: Please select a profile to view headhunting history.

share.customizeDesc: Personalize your headhunt tracker share card

import.privacyDesc: Your token is only used temporarily to fetch your pull history and is never stored. All pull data is stored locally on your device and associated with your current profile.

bookmarkSteps.step2: Right-click your bookmarks bar → Add page/bookmark
bookmarkSteps.step4: Paste the code into the URL field

step1.title: Login to SKPORT
step1.description: Open {link} and login with your game account.

step2.title: Create Bookmarklet
step2.description: Copy the bookmarklet code and create a bookmark in your browser.

step3.title: Run Bookmarklet
step3.description: While on {skport}, type the bookmark name in the address bar, select it from suggestions, and choose your server region.

step1.title: Download and Install Requestly
step1.description: Download Requestly from {link}. It's free and open source.

step2.title: Setup Requestly
step2.description: Open Requestly and click {skip} on the welcome screen. Then click {enable} to start intercepting traffic.

step3.title: Install Certificate
step3.description: When prompted to install the certificate, click {yes}. This allows Requestly to intercept HTTPS traffic.

step4.title: Open Headhunting Records
step4.description: Launch Arknights: Endfield, go to {menu} tab.

step5.title: Find Network Request
step5.description: In Requestly, look for a request to {url}.

step6.title: Copy URL
step6.description: Right-click on the request and select {copy}.

step1.title: Open Headhunting Records
step1.description: Launch Arknights: Endfield, go to {menu} tab and wait for it to load.

step3.title: Run PowerShell Command
step3.description: Copy and paste the command below into PowerShell and press {enter}.

iosGuide.safariAlertDesc: If you have another browser installed, make sure to set Safari as your default browser in Settings → Safari → Default Browser App before proceeding.

step2.title: Allow VPN
step2.description: Open the app, then allow VPN in system preferences ({settings}).

step3.title: Install CA
step3.description: Click {sniff} on Stream App → {installCA} → A popup window will appear and choose {allow} → Now CA is downloaded.

step4.title: Install Certificate
step4.description: Go to {settings} → Click on {streamCA} and install.

step5.title: Open Game
step5.description: Open Arknights: Endfield then go to {menu}, stay on that page.

step6.title: Start Sniffing
step6.description: Back to Stream App → Choose {trusted} → Tap {sniff} Button.

step7.title: Open Headhunting Records
step7.description: Back to Arknights: Endfield then open the {records} tab.

step11.title: Copy URL
step11.description: Click {request} tab, then copy the link.

globalStats.dataChangeTooltip: In-game pull history expires after 3 months. Data updates as more users import their records.
globalStats.pullsPerDayDesc: Showing pulls per day and rarity distribution
globalStats.pullsPerServerDesc: Showing distribution of pulls per server
globalStats.pullsPerPityDesc: Showing total pulls per pity number
globalStats.potentialDistributionDesc: Showing how many duplicates players have

timeline.showLocalTime: Show times adjusted to your local time zone
timeline.noEvents: No events found for this version
timeline.compareLocalTime: Compare your local time to server times
timeline.serverTimesNote: Server times are shown in their respective time zones.

planner.noMaterials: Add operators or weapons to see required materials

map.helpMessage: Help us grow by sharing this tool with fellow Endministrators on social media and Discord servers. The more players join, the richer our community discussions become.

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage your Google account and sync settings.
account.notSignedInDesc: Please sign in with Google to enable sync features.
account.lastSyncDesc: The last time your data was synced with Google Drive.
account.syncSettingsDesc: Configure how your data syncs with Google Drive.
account.autoSyncDesc: Automatically sync your data when changes are made.
account.autoSyncEnabledDesc: Your data will automatically sync to Google Drive.
account.autoSyncDisabledDesc: You'll need to manually sync your data.
account.manualSyncDesc: Manually trigger a sync with Google Drive.
account.syncFailedDesc: Failed to sync data with Google Drive. Please try again.
account.downloadRemoteDesc: Download and restore your data from Google Drive.
account.downloadSuccessDesc: Successfully downloaded and restored data from Google Drive.
account.downloadFailedDesc: Failed to download data from Google Drive. Please try again.
account.noRemoteDataDesc: No data found in Google Drive to download.
account.dataHistoryDesc: View and restore from your Google Drive backup files.
account.signInToViewBackups: Sign in with Google to view your backup history

data.title: Data
data.description: Backup and restore your game data.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your privacy preferences and data sharing settings.
privacy.globalStatsDesc: Help improve the community by sharing your pull data anonymously for global statistics.
privacy.optInSuccessDesc: Thank you for contributing to global statistics!
privacy.optOutSuccessDesc: Your data will no longer be shared with global statistics.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: Learn about what data we collect and how it's used.
privacy.collectPityCounters: Pity counter progress and reset information
privacy.collectBannerStats: Banner pull counts and success rates
privacy.howWeUseDataDesc: Your anonymized pull data helps us create accurate global statistics, including average pity rates, banner success rates, and character/weapon popularity. This information benefits the entire community by providing insights into game mechanics and pull probabilities.
privacy.anonymizedDesc: All submitted data is completely anonymized and cannot be traced back to you. We only collect statistical information to help the community understand pull rates and probabilities.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

seo.siteDescription: Your ultimate Arknights: Endfield companion. Track pulls, analyze pity counters, view global stats, plan factory builds, and access comprehensive guides to optimize your gameplay.

pages.headhuntTracker: Track your Arknights: Endfield gacha pulls, analyze pity counters, and view detailed pull history across all banners.
pages.shareHeadhunt: Share your Arknights: Endfield headhunt tracker statistics and pull history with a beautiful customizable card.
pages.globalStats: View global player statistics for Arknights: Endfield. Analyze pull rates, pity distributions, server breakdowns, and item popularity across the community.
pages.operators: Browse all playable operators in Arknights: Endfield. Filter by profession, rarity, and type. View detailed stats, skills, and upgrade materials.
pages.weapons: Explore all weapons in Arknights: Endfield. Filter by rarity, view stats, skills, and breakthrough materials for each weapon.
pages.materials: Browse all materials in Arknights: Endfield. Filter by rarity, view material details, rarity, and usage for operator and weapon upgrades.
pages.gears: Explore all equipment suits in Arknights: Endfield. View gear set bonuses, passive effects, and required pieces for each suit.
pages.planner: Plan operator and weapon upgrades in Arknights: Endfield. Calculate required materials for ascension, skills, and talents with our comprehensive planner.
pages.achievements: Track your achievements and progress in Arknights: Endfield. View all achievement categories, groups, and completion statistics.
pages.timeline: View the complete event timeline for Arknights: Endfield. Track current and upcoming events, banners, and activities with real-time countdowns.
pages.interactiveMap: Explore interactive maps of Arknights: Endfield with detailed locations, collectibles, and points of interest across all regions.
pages.operatorDetails: View detailed information for {name} in Arknights: Endfield. Check attributes, skills, talents, ascension materials, and more.
pages.weaponDetails: View detailed information for {name} in Arknights: Endfield. Check weapon stats, skills, breakthrough materials, and upgrade requirements.

settings.general: Configure your language, regional preferences, and game server settings.
settings.account: Manage your Google account connection and sync settings for cloud backup.
settings.data: Manage your game profiles, export and import your data for backup and restore.
settings.privacy: Control your privacy preferences and manage global statistics contribution.

import.index: Import your Arknights: Endfield pull history from game logs
import.android: Import your Arknights: Endfield pull history from Android using Bookmarklet
import.ios: Import your Arknights: Endfield pull history from iOS
